title: Positive registration flow with valid inputs
test_steps: Open the InstaCare app. | Navigate to the registration screen. | Enter the mobile number '4155791638' in the input field. | Enter the username 'Appcrawler' in the input field. | Enter the first OTP '123456' in the input field. | Enter the second OTP '123456' in the input field. | Click on the 'CONFIRM' button.
expected_result: The app should display a success message indicating the registration is complete. | The user should be redirected to the account details page.

title: Negative flow with empty mobile number
test_steps: Open the InstaCare app. | Navigate to the registration screen. | Enter the mobile number '' in the input field. | Enter the username 'Appcrawler' in the input field. | Enter the first OTP '123456' in the input field. | Enter the second OTP '123456' in the input field. | Click on the 'CONFIRM' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that the mobile number is required.

title: Negative flow with invalid mobile number
test_steps: Open the InstaCare app. | Navigate to the registration screen. | Enter the mobile number '123456789' in the input field. | Enter the username 'Appcrawler' in the input field. | Enter the first OTP '123456' in the input field. | Enter the second OTP '123456' in the input field. | Click on the 'CONFIRM' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that the mobile number is invalid.

title: Negative flow with empty username
test_steps: Open the InstaCare app. | Navigate to the registration screen. | Enter the mobile number '4155791638' in the input field. | Enter the username '' in the input field. | Enter the first OTP '123456' in the input field. | Enter the second OTP '123456' in the input field. | Click on the 'CONFIRM' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that the username is required.

title: Negative flow with invalid username
test_steps: Open the InstaCare app. | Navigate to the registration screen. | Enter the mobile number '4155791638' in the input field. | Enter the username 'Appcrawler123' in the input field. | Enter the first OTP '123456' in the input field. | Enter the second OTP '123456' in the input field. | Click on the 'CONFIRM' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that the username is invalid.
